use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULT PATIENTS FOR WHOM TREATMENT WITH BOTH AMLODIPINE FOR HYPERTENSION AND CELECOXIB FOR OSTEOARTHRITIS ARE APPROPRIATE

indications.text:
1.1 Hypertension and Osteoarthritis
CONSENSI is indicated in adult patients for whom treatment with both amlodipine for hypertension and celecoxib for
osteoarthritis are appropriate.
